Vinayapiṭaka/X/X/1.text: Saṁ 3. 368; Vi 3. 14 piṭṭhesu. 2. Saṁ 2. 251; Vi 3. 44 piṭṭhesu. 3. Khu 1. 8 piṭṭhe.
Bhavacakkaṁ idāni taṁ (sabbattha) Visuddhimaggaṭīkāyaṁ cha-anussatiniddese Buddhānussatikathāvaṇṇanāyaṁ passitabbaṁ.
Gaṇḍapānaṁ (Sī), gaṇḍupānaṁ (Syā, Ka), Saṁ-Ṭṭha 1. 309 piṭṭhe passitabbaṁ.
Sīhapātano (Syā), sīhappapātano (Ka), Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 25; Aṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 218 piṭṭhesu pana passitabbaṁ.
Tamāhu dakkhiṇeyyānaṁ aggataṁ (Sī), yamāhu dakkhiṇeyyānaṁ aggataṁ (Syā, Ka)
Yā guṇanimittā (Sī) 2-2. Te satthu paccakkhabhūtā guṇavisesā viya (Sī), te satthu paccakkhabhūtāti guṇā viya sāpi (Syā)

variants.reading: te satthu paccakkhabhūtāti guṇā viya sāpi

Vinayapiṭaka/X/X/12.text: Yathādhippetatthasiddhipativissaṭṭhassa cittassa (Syā, Ka) Yathādhippetatthasiddhiṁ pati vissaṭṭhacittassa (Sī)

Sāratthadīpanīṭīkā/X/X/13.text: Yathādhippetatthasiddhipativissaṭṭhassa cittassa (Syā, Ka) Yathādhippetatthasiddhiṁ pati vissaṭṭhacittassa (Sī)
